race.description: South Grafton Ex-Servicemen's Club Mdn Plate
race.comment: GOODONYA AUSBRED (2) has a host of gear changes at his third race start and expected to go close over the extra trip. Closed strongly with the 59.5kg for a narrow second over 1305m at Coffs Harbour. Cherry-ripe now and can get cover from the gate. HABIB ALBI (3) has been thereabouts all prep and finds a winnable race out to the 1410m. Gripped on late with the 59kg to secure third over 1204m at Port Macquarie. Holds a forward position and has genuine top-thee prospects. MISS MIDAS TOUCH (12) good fresh mare who resumed with a tidy second over 1200m at Inverell in the small field. Gets the benefit of Spokes' 2kg claim and warrants plenty of respect. ANTONUCCI (6) two runs back this time in have been encouraging and ready for the extra trip. Must overcome the wide gate with the 3kg claimer aboard. Place preferred. MOTION A NATION (13) improving filly who caught the eye when third first-up at Ballina. Don't dismiss.
